## What's the use case?

<!--
What are you trying to do that the current Stift makes hard or
impossible? Concrete scenarios are more valuable than abstract
suggestions -- "I want to annotate microscopy images with scale
bars" tells us much more than "Add a scale bar feature".
-->

## What would you like to see?

<!-- Your proposed solution, if you have one in mind. -->

## What have you tried as a workaround?

<!-- If anything. -->

## Anything else?

<!--
Mockups, links to other tools that do this well, related issues,
prior art. All optional.
-->
